SELECT arrayShiftRight(arr, 2) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayShiftRight(arr, -2) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayShiftRight(arr, 1, 99) AS res FROM test_array;
CREATED TABLE nested_table (id Int32, arr Array(String));
SELECT id, arrayShiftRight(arr, 2, 'missing') AS shifted_arr FROM nested_table;
SELECT arrayShiftRight((SELECT arr FROM nested_table WHERE id = 1), 1) AS res;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id Int32, arr Array(Float32), group_id Int32);
SELECT group_id, arrayShiftRight(arr, 1, 0.0) AS new_arr FROM multi_table_test GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE additional_test (arr1 Array(Int8), arr2 Array(Int8));
SELECT arrayShiftRight(arr1, 2) AS shifted_arr1, arrayShiftRight(arr2, -1) AS shifted_arr2 FROM additional_test;
